skillsSnapshot.prompt:
The following skills provide specialized instructions for specific tasks.
Use the read tool to load a skill's file when the task matches its description.
When a skill file references a relative path, resolve it against the skill directory (parent of SKILL.md / dirname of the path) and use that absolute path in tool commands.

<available_skills>
  <skill>
    <name>coding-agent</name>
    <description>Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/coding-agent/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>healthcheck</name>
    <description>Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/healthcheck/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>node-connect</name>
    <description>Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.</description>
    <location>~/Cursor/openclaw/skills/node-connect/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>savechat</name>
    <description>Archive current session to sessions.json so it appears in the session list. Use when the user says "savechat", "save chat", "保存对话", "归档对话", or wants to save/archive the current conversation before starting a new one.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/savechat/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>skill-creator</name>
    <description>Create or update AgentSkills. Use when designing, structuring, or packaging skills with scripts, references, and assets.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/skill-creator/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>weather</name>
    <description>Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/weather/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>screenshot</name>
    <description>MacOS screenshot capture tool. Use when: user asks to take screenshots, capture screen regions, or save screenshots to files.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/screenshot/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>session-sync</name>
    <description>Sync OpenClaw sessions to a GitHub repository for seamless continuation across different machines. Use when the user says "save-session", "save-all-session", "session-list", "update-session", "update-all-session", "merge-session", "sync session", "备份会话", "同步会话", or wants to push/pull session data to/from GitHub. NOT for: general git operations, file syncing, or other backup tasks.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/session-sync/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>wechat-helper</name>
    <description>WeChat management and automation helper. Use when: user asks to open WeChat, check WeChat status, or automate WeChat workflows via AppleScript.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/wechat-helper/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
</available_skills>

  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>node-connect</name>
    <description>Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.</description>
    <location>~/cursor/openclaw/skills/node-connect/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>savechat</name>
    <description>Archive current session to sessions.json so it appears in the session list. Use when the user says "savechat", "save chat", "保存对话", "归档对话", or wants to save/archive the current conversation before starting a new one.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/savechat/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>session-logs</name>
    <description>Search and analyze your own session logs (older/parent conversations) using jq.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/session-logs/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>skill-creator</name>
    <description>Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills. Use when creating a new skill from scratch or when asked to improve, review, audit, tidy up, or clean up an existing skill or SKILL.md file. Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/skill-creator/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>weather</name>
    <description>Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/weather/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>alert-analysis</name>
    <description>告警分析工具。通过自然语言描述，自动查询星火告警数据并进行分析。
支持按时间范围、告警类型筛选，输出告警趋势、分布、TOP N 等分析结论。</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/alert-analysis/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>cursor-team</name>
    <description>Cursor Team Analytics 数据采集与分析。通过已登录的浏览器访问 Cursor 团队分析页面， 按账号维度提取 AI 代码贡献率和仓库级别数据。 触发词: "cursor-team", "cursor analytics", "cursor 分析", "AI使用率", "ai-committed"。 触发示例: "cursor-team 生成近7天AI使用率分析", "cursor-team 7 ai-committed", "使用cursor-team生成近30天分析", "cursor-team 近7天"。</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/cursor-team/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>quick-weather</name>
    <description>Quick weather lookup for multiple cities via wttr.in API with compact terminal output. Use when: user asks about weather for multiple cities, needs to compare weather between locations, needs compact weather output in terminal or script, or checking weather for travel planning.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/quick-weather/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>session-sync</name>
    <description>Sync OpenClaw sessions to a GitHub repository for seamless continuation across different machines. Use when the user says "save-session", "save-all-session", "session-list", "update-session", "update-all-session", "merge-session", "delete-session", "sync session", "备份会话", "同步会话", "删除会话", or wants to push/pull/delete session data to/from GitHub. NOT for: general git operations, file syncing, or other backup tasks.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/session-sync/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>xinghuo-utils</name>
    <description>星火(xinghuo)数据工具集。提供 curl 命令解析、静态认证信息提取、API 调用等功能。

功能：
- 提取静态认证信息（headers、cookies）生成 xh_token.txt
- 动态部分：URL、--data-raw
- 静态部分：所有 -H headers、-b cookies
- 解析 --data-raw 中的 JSON，提取关键业务参数
- 拼接 xh_token.txt 静态部分，执行 curl 查询星火 API</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/xinghuo-utils/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
</available_skills>

compactionCheckpoints.summary:
## 目标
撰写一篇关于 RAG 搜索能力演进的专题文章，从向量检索到 Agentic Retrieval，涵盖技术演进、应用场景和开源实践。

## 限制与偏好
- 文章语言：中文
- 无篇幅限制
- 引用应以近期（2024-2026年）资料、主要科技公司的实践和权威学术论文优先
- 用户倾向于批判性分析而非乐观的叙述
- 用户从 Claude 4.6 引入外部审阅意见，用于迭代改进
- 文件保存到 workspace 根目录，文件名使用中文

## 进度
### 已完成
- [x] 阅读Anthropic的“Seeing Like an Agent”博客文章作为初始参考
- [x] 讨论并就文章提纲和框架达成一致
- [x] 收集资料：arXiv 论文、GitHub 仓库、微软文档、Anthropic 文档
- [x] 用户提供了11条带链接的参考资料，并已全部获取和验证
- [x] 撰写了 v1 版本（保存在 `output/rag-evolution-v1.md`）
- [x] 将文件重命名为中文并移动到 workspace 根目录：`/Users/lvzheng/.openclaw/workspace-assistant-circle/RAG搜索能力演进-从向量检索到Agentic-Retrieval.md`
- [x] v2 版本：根据 Claude 4.6 的反馈进行了修改 — 增强了 GraphRAG 的局限性，深化了 Agentic RAG 的批判，细化了长上下文与 RAG 的讨论，在应用场景中添加了架构推荐
- [x] v3 版本：修改了5.4节（从“检索即推理”断言改为谨慎的观察），5.1节（增加了 RRF 的局限性），总结表格（添加了共存框架而非线性叙述）
- [x] v4 版本：同步引言使其与正文内容保持一致，移除了总结段落中的重复内容

### 进行中
- [ ] 文章正在等待用户审阅 v4 版本

### 受阻
- `web_search`（Brave API 密钥缺失）不可用；只能使用 `web_fetch` 处理特定 URL
- 多个网站获取失败（LangChain 博客、LlamaIndex 博客、Cohere、Microsoft GraphRAG docs 等）

## 关键决策
- **文章主线**：搜索自主权正从系统向模型转移（但被表述为一个方向，而非必然的终点）
- **批判性立场优于乐观立场**：用户/审阅者更倾向于对 Agentic RAG 的局限性、GraphRAG 的成本障碍以及混合搜索的工程现实进行诚实的评估
- **共存而非取代**：v3 版本的修正——五种 RAG 范式是共存的，而非取代
- **文件位置**：workspace 根目录，中文名称

## 下一步
1. 等待用户审阅当前 v4 版本
2. 解决用户或 Claude 4.6 提出的任何进一步反馈
3. 如果用户满意，可能最终定稿

## 关键背景
- **文件路径**：`/Users/lvzheng/.openclaw/workspace-assistant-circle/RAG搜索能力演进-从向量检索到Agentic-Retrieval.md`
- **用户提供的包含验证状态的关键参考资料**：RAG 原始论文 (arXiv:2005.11401) ✅, GraphRAG (Microsoft) ✅, Azure Hybrid Search ✅, A-RAG (arXiv:2602.03442) ✅, SoK Agentic RAG (arXiv:2603.07379) ✅, Seeing Like an Agent ✅, Azure RAG 新定义 ✅, Azure Agentic Retrieval ✅, Claude Code docs ✅
- **文中引用的开源项目**：Mem0, Graphiti, LlamaIndex, LangGraph, RAGFlow, Dify, Khoj, Microsoft GraphRAG
- **Brave Search API 密钥**未配置（`openclaw configure --section web`）
- 用户正在与 Claude 4.6 进行外部审阅并反馈修改意见

---

**Turn Context (split turn):**

## Original Request
The user shared feedback from a discussion between Gemini and Claude about an article the assistant wrote on RAG search capability evolution. Two key points were raised: (1) GraphRAG's "hallucination hardening into storage layer" issue — hallucinated content gets baked into the knowledge graph, systematically polluting all future retrieval; (2) Data governance — the article focuses entirely on "how to search" without addressing knowledge base quality ("garbage in garbage out"), which gets amplified by multi-step reasoning in Agentic RAG.

## Early Progress
- The assistant acknowledged both points as accurate and committed to incorporating them into the article
- The assistant began reading the article file (`RAG搜索能力演进-从向量检索到Agentic-Retrieval.md`) to find the right places to insert the new content
- Read sections covering GraphRAG (2.2), Hybrid Search (2.3), and Agentic RAG (2.4) to understand current structure and identify insertion points

## Context for Suffix
- The article covers RAG evolution: vector search → advanced retrieval (CRAG, multi-hop) → GraphRAG → Hybrid Search → Agentic RAG
- Two additions needed: (a) GraphRAG section needs a "hallucination hardening" critique added after the existing limitations; (b) A data governance section needs to be added, likely as a new section addressing knowledge base quality as a prerequisite for effective retrieval
- The assistant was in the process of reading more of the file to find the complete structure before making edits

<modified-files>
/Users/lvzheng/.openclaw/workspace-assistant-circle/RAG搜索能力演进-从向量检索到Agentic-Retrieval.md
/Users/lvzheng/.openclaw/workspace-assistant-circle/output/rag-evolution-v1.md
</modified-files>
